intro: Two worlds collide, and something beautiful begins.
description:
The story follows Rapunzel and Alice, two girls from different magical worlds, who meet in a mysterious place where worlds, time, and magic connect. When this place begins to lose its balance, they must work together to understand what is happening and how to restore harmony.

Along the way, they learn that not every problem is solved by force or speed. Instead, the worlds respond when they listen, cooperate, and make thoughtful choices. From their journey, a new world is born, one that grows from curiosity, kindness, and trust rather than strict rules.

In the end, the story shows that moving forward does not always mean rushing ahead, and that true connection happens when different worlds learn to walk together without losing who they are.

An interactive storybook experience. A linear narrative adventure perfect for young readers to enjoy a captivating tale at their own pace.
